user.title: STRATO credentials
user.description: Enter the STRATO DynDNS username and password. On the next page, add all domains or subdomains together. IPv4 and IPv6 are then enabled by default for every domain and can be adjusted directly through per-domain switches.

domains.title: Add domains and subdomains
domains.description: Add all STRATO DynDNS-enabled domains and subdomains here. The setup then finishes directly, without asking you to configure every domain in another wizard step.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure STRATO DynDNS Service
reconfigure.description: Adjust the STRATO DynDNS username and password. Afterwards, edit the complete domain list directly again.

reconfigure_domains.title: Edit domains and subdomains
reconfigure_domains.description: Edit the complete list of configured domains and subdomains here. IPv4 and IPv6 remain preserved for existing domains and can later be changed directly through the domain switches.

error.invalid_auth: Please enter a username and password.
error.invalid_hostname: Please enter a valid domain or subdomain.
error.duplicate_hostname: This domain or subdomain has already been added.
error.no_domains: Please add at least one valid domain or subdomain.

abort.already_configured: STRATO DynDNS Service is already configured.
abort.wrong_entry: The selected entry does not match this setup.

options.auto: Automatic based on the domain configuration

update_domains.name: Update domains
update_domains.description: Update one or more configured STRATO DynDNS domains, automatically split larger updates into batches of 10, and return the structured overall response together with the corresponding per-domain results.

device_id.name: Domain devices
device_id.description: Select one or more configured domain devices provided by this integration.

ip_version.name: IP version
ip_version.description: Choose whether only IPv4, only IPv6, or the domain-specific automatic mode should be used.
